source.title: NPNF-212. Leo the Great, Gregory the Great

verses.text: (In which, after speaking of his own efforts for the Faith, he objects to monks being permitted to preach, especially if heretically inclined, and asks Julian to stir up the Emperor’s zeal for the Faith.)
